case_title: MELISSA HUNSBEDT VS. MARTHA IVERSEN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-17-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT IVERSEN, MARTHA

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-23-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-27-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. OCT-18-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-19-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH JUN-20-2003. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON MAY-19-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNSBEDT, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT IVERSEN, MARTHA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-19-2002
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED BY THE DEFT FILED BY DEFENDANT IVERSEN, MARTHA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED BY THE DEFT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNSBEDT, MELISSA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR KATE KARDOS-POLEVOI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-24-2003 THROUGH APR-24-2003.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-19-2003 3:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-17-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED. AUG-07-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNSBEDT, MELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVERSEN, MARTHA $12,605.12 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,605.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNSBEDT, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT IVERSEN, MARTHA
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-16-2003.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY GROENEVELD, GREG
